name: Rock Candy Experiment
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the sugar in the hot water.
2. Tie one end of the string to the pencil and place it across the top of the jar.
3. Lower the other end of the string into the sugar-water mixture.
4. Allow the solution to stand for several days until crystals form and become hard.
5. Once ready, remove the candy from the jar and enjoy your homemade rock candy.
